title: Rich Savory Ukrainian Mushroom Dumplings
description: A fatty and creamy Ukrainian dish featuring mushrooms, perfect for a midnight craving, and can be made vegan-friendly by substituting certain ingredients.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add the plant based milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes in a warm place.
In a separate pan, sauté the mushrooms and onion in vegan butter until they are softened.
Add the nutritional yeast to the mushroom mixture and stir to combine.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a spoonful of the mushroom mixture in the center.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Cook the dumplings in boiling water for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite toppings.
